title: Scheduled ferry (v1)
description: A single ferry/boat definition persisted as data/ferries/<ferry-id>.json. Describes a scheduled transport 'room' (the deck) that moves between an ordered list of dock rooms on a tick timetable, carrying any players standing on its deck to the next dock. Movement is deterministic (driven by tick counts, never wall-clock time; AGENTS.md §5). The loader tolerates only the properties listed here.

schema_version.description: File schema version; must match the loader's supported version exactly.

id.description: Unique, stable ferry id (matches the file name by convention).

name.description: Human-readable display name, used in default departure/arrival announcements.

deck_room_id.description: Id of the room players stand in while aboard the ferry. Occupants of this room are carried to the next dock when the ferry departs.

route.description: Ordered list of dock room ids the ferry visits. After the last dock the ferry cycles back to the first.

ticks_per_leg.description: Number of ticks the ferry waits at each dock before departing for the next one.

start_leg_index.description: Index into 'route' of the dock the ferry starts moored at. Defaults to 0 when omitted; must be a valid index into 'route'.

departure_messages.description: Optional flavour lines announced (one chosen at random) when the ferry departs. A default line is used when omitted or empty.

arrival_messages.description: Optional flavour lines announced (one chosen at random) when the ferry arrives at a dock. A default line is used when omitted or empty.
